2605.20751.title: PACD-Net: Pseudo-Augmented Contrastive Distillation for Glycemic Control Estimation from SMBG
2605.20751.paper_summary: Effective diabetes management requires continuous monitoring of glycemic levels. Clinically, glycemic control is assessed using metrics such as Time in Range (TIR), Time Below Range (TBR), and Time Above Range (TAR), typically derived from continuous glucose monitoring (CGM). However, many patients rely on self-monitoring of blood glucose (SMBG) due to the high cost and limited accessibility of CGM. Unlike CGM, SMBG provides sparse and irregular measurements, making accurate estimation of these metrics challenging. Conventional supervised learning approaches struggle under such sparsity, leading to poor generalization and unstable performance. To address this, we propose PACD-Net, a self-supervised contrastive knowledge distillation framework for estimating glycemic control from SMBG. Pseudo-SMBG samples with richer temporal coverage are used as teacher signals to guide learning from sparse observations. In addition, multi-view contrastive learning enforces representation consistency across diverse sampling patterns. The model adopts a hybrid Swin Transformer-CNN backbone to capture temporal dependencies in sparse SMBG sequences. Experimental results demonstrate that PACD-Net consistently outperforms existing methods in estimating TAR, TIR, and TBR from real-world SMBG data, achieving improved accuracy as well as enhanced stability and generalization under extremely sparse observation settings. The proposed framework provides a practical tool for clinical SMBG interpretation and offers a generalizable approach for learning from sparse and irregularly sampled sensor data in broader applications.
2605.20751.paper_summary_zh: 有效的糖尿病管理需要持續監測血糖水平。臨床上，血糖控制通常使用如範圍內時間（Time in Range, TIR）、範圍下時間（Time Below Range, TBR）和範圍上時間（Time Above Range, TAR）等指標來評估，這些指標通常來自持續血糖監測（Continuous Glucose Monitoring, CGM）。然而，許多患者因為CGM的高成本和有限的可及性而依賴自我監測血糖（Self-Monitoring of Blood Glucose, SMBG）。與CGM不同，SMBG提供稀疏且不規則的測量，使得準確估算這些指標變得具有挑戰性。傳統的監督學習方法在這種稀疏性下表現不佳，導致泛化能力差和性能不穩定。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了PACD-Net，一種自我監督對比知識蒸餾框架，用於從SMBG中估算血糖控制。使用具有更豐富時間覆蓋的偽SMBG樣本作為教師信號，以指導從稀疏觀測中學習。此外，多視角對比學習強化了不同取樣模式下的表示一致性。該模型採用混合的Swin Transformer-CNN骨幹，以捕捉稀疏SMBG序列中的時間依賴性。實驗結果表明，PACD-Net在從真實世界的SMBG數據中估算TAR、TIR和TBR方面始終優於現有方法，實現了更高的準確性以及在極度稀疏觀測條件下增強的穩定性和泛化能力。所提出的框架為臨床SMBG解讀提供了一個實用工具，並為在更廣泛的應用中從稀疏和不規則取樣的傳感器數據中學習提供了一種可泛化的方法。
2605.20751.author: Canyu Lei et.al.
2605.20751.authors: Canyu Lei, David Repaske, Jianxin Xie
